Iran rebuffs, claims 'full control.' No signal changes that affect capped 100 score. Oil remains >$100. Fujairah fire partially contained but loading still disrupted. 100 (stable, capped).

NEW: (1) Israel planning MASSIVE ground invasion to seize entire area south of Litani River — dismantle Hezbollah military infrastructure (Axios). This is a significant expansion beyond current operations. (2) 14 medical workers killed in Israeli strikes on al-Sawaneh and Borj Qalaouiye (NYT/Lebanon health min). turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Turkey continuing Pak-Afghanistan mediation with China. No new intercept events. Eastern Med naval presence continues. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India condemning Pakistan — MEA 'act of aggression' statement well-covered but no military escalation signals on India-Pakistan border. Diplomatic only. Two Indian ships passed Hormuz per Iran's exception. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil. US easing sanctions on Russian oil. Kremlin expects strategic benefits from Iran war. No direct ME intervention. 42 + 8 (Iran coupling) = 50.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China mediating Pak-Afghanistan. No new escalation signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed. Third provocation this week. No new launches in past 24h. 47 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. Kyiv death toll 6 killed / 15 wounded. Zelenskyy warns Russia exploiting ME war. 460 aerial targets intercepted overnight. Ukrainian drones hitting Russia's Black Sea oil facilities. No major new developments in past 4h. 67 + 5 (coupling) = 72.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 16 04:04. UPDATE: Pakistan airstrikes kill 16 Afghan civilians (India TV/UN). India MEA condemns as 'act of aggression' — strong statement from Randhir Jaiswal. Pakistan Defence Minister Khawaja Asif declares 'open war.' Afghanistan FM Muttaqi says 'facing imposed war.' China/Turkey mediation failing. Cycle intensifying. No ceasefire signals. 98 (stable at ceiling).

latest_news.headline: Israel planning massive ground invasion south of Litani River to dismantle Hezbollah
latest_news.text: Israel planning to significantly expand ground operation in Lebanon, aiming to seize entire area south of Litani River and dismantle Hezbollah's military infrastructure. Major escalation of existing operations.

latest_news.headline: 15 killed in Isfahan strikes
latest_news.text: Israeli/US strikes kill 15 in Iran's Isfahan city. Central Iran continues to be targeted alongside military and nuclear-adjacent sites.

latest_news.headline: 773 Lebanese killed including 100+ children since March 2
latest_news.text: 773 Lebanese people killed by Israel's campaign in Lebanon since March 2, including more than 100 children. Entire families wiped out, towns emptied.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 14 medical workers in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Lebanon's health ministry said Israeli strikes in al-Sawaneh and Borj Qalaouiye killed 14 medical workers and injured six more.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan airstrikes kill 16 Afghan civilians — UN reports
latest_news.text: Pakistan's airstrikes in Afghanistan killed at least 16 civilians and injured 15 others. UN reports civilian casualties mount as conflict intensifies.

latest_news.headline: India condemns Pakistan airstrikes as 'act of aggression' — MEA
latest_news.text: India's MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal strongly condemns Pakistan airstrikes, calling them 'another act of aggression' and demanding Afghanistan's sovereignty be respected.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls on allies to keep Strait of Hormuz open — naval coalition forming
latest_news.text: Trump says allies who rely on Gulf oil must help keep Strait of Hormuz open. Iran says it will target any transit attempt. Naval coalition forming.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan Defence Minister declares 'open war' with Afghanistan
latest_news.text: Pakistan Defence Minister Khawaja Asif declared 'open war' between Pakistan and Afghanistan. Afghanistan FM Muttaqi says country is 'facing an imposed war.'
